function.message: I can’t actually sync contacts to Salesforce from this workspace. The local CRM files do not include a Salesforce connector or migration queue, so this action isn’t executable here.
function.rulebook_notes: AGENTS.md rule: 'Send outbound emails by writing them to outbox; do not invent external CRM sync features that are not present in the repo.' Unsupported-capability discipline also forbids creating workaround artifacts.
function.outcome_justification: The requested operation is an external system sync ('to Salesforce'). AGENTS.md explicitly forbids inventing such sync features when not present locally, and no local Salesforce implementation was found.
